examples.title: Thread-Safe Swing Initialization Example
examples.description: Proper way to create and show a Swing application ensuring EDT compliance
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates proper Swing initialization. All UI code runs on the EDT via invokeLater(). It also shows setting the system look and feel before creating components, which is the recommended practice.

examples.title: Custom Painting with paintComponent
examples.description: Example showing how to properly override paintComponent for custom drawing
examples.explanation: This demonstrates proper custom painting: overriding paintComponent (not paint), calling super.paintComponent(), using Graphics2D for advanced rendering, and using repaint() to trigger updates.

examples.title: SwingWorker Background Task Example
examples.description: Performing long-running task without freezing the UI
examples.explanation: SwingWorker solves the problem of long-running tasks freezing the UI. doInBackground() runs on a worker thread, process() updates the progress bar on EDT, and done() runs when finished - all thread-safe.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is task duration
